name: agentrail
description: Agent-native protocol for reading, simulating, and executing EVM contract interactions with structured JSON.

scripts.build: mkdir -p dist/adapters && ~/.bun/bin/bun build ./src/index.ts --target=node --format=esm --outfile ./dist/index.js && ~/.bun/bin/bun build ./src/sdk.ts --target=node --format=esm --outfile ./dist/sdk.js && ~/.bun/bin/bun build ./src/adapters/openai.ts --target=node --format=esm --outfile ./dist/adapters/openai.js && ~/.bun/bin/bun build ./src/adapters/langchain.ts --target=node --format=esm --outfile ./dist/adapters/langchain.js && ~/.bun/bin/bun build ./src/live-verify.ts --target=node --format=esm --outfile ./dist/live-verify.js && ~/.bun/bin/bun build ./src/agent-eval.ts --target=node --format=esm --outfile ./dist/agent-eval.js && ~/.bun/bin/bun build ./src/hyperliquid-eval.ts --target=node --format=esm --outfile ./dist/hyperliquid-eval.js
